remediation: Bound the active release feature's gate-proof re-validation to the feature's OWN latest release-transition commit (featureReleaseHead) instead of the live symbolic HEAD: add a headRef param to GateProofValidator.ValidateAffectedTestProof/ValidateScope and pass featureReleaseHead from CycleService.ReleaseTrain.GateProofStatusForFeature.
summary: Release-train re-validated the active feature's gate proof against LIVE HEAD, so an unrelated later commit (a separate bug fix on the same branch) falsely invalidated the unchanged feature and blocked the release.
